meta.name: description
meta.content: Viction, previously known as TomoChain, is a people-centric layer-1 blockchain that provides zero-gas transactions and heightened security, making Web3 accessible and safe for everyone. With a design emphasis on user experience, Viction prioritizes zero-gas transactions through the innovative TRC25 token standard, alongside speed, security, and scalability, all contributing to a more secure and open world.
